page_metadata.biotools__summary: OCD is a command-line tool for the calculation of immunoglobulin inter-domain orientations. The OCD tool automatically creates a reasonable coordinate system for the characterization of inter-domain orientations based on a user-provided reference structure.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: OCD is a command-line tool for the calculation of immunoglobulin inter-domain orientations. The OCD tool automatically creates a reasonable coordinate system for the characterization of inter-domain orientations based on a user-provided reference structure.
